name: From Language to Navigation Goals: A Vision-Language Approach for Semantic Navigation of Mobile Robots Using RGB-D Perception

description: arXiv:2607.13624v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Natural language interaction provides an intuitive way for non-expert users to communicate with robotic platforms. However, transforming user requests into executable navigation actions remains a challenging task, requiring the integration of language understanding, environment perception, and autonomous navigation. This work presents a language...
author: Jose Mart\'inez-Fajardo, Pablo Pueyo, Fernando Caballero, Luis Merino
